_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in diagnosing and resolving ML infrastructure failures, including training job crashes, serving latency spikes, resource contention across shared clusters, and data pipeline breakdowns that affect model inputs.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.487), TF-S-012 (TF, cosine: 0.483).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.499). Shared vocabulary: [diagnosing, skill]. DCWF-only terms [connectivity, problems] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, affect, breakdowns, clusters, contention, crashes] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.904 (P=0.948, R=0.864). P exceeds R by 0.083 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in diagnosing connectivity problems." and "Skill in diagnosing and resolving ML infrastructure failures, including training" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.527 ≈ STS 0.499 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [diagnosing, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [diagnosing, skill]. DCWF-only: [connectivity, problems]. WIDAI-only: [across, affect, breakdowns, clusters, contention, crashes].
